rows.label: tev057801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Gotsu about the secrets of
Nightglow Forest's indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Gotsu about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Gotsu about the secrets of
Nightglow Forest's indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0001
rows.name:
Simius are seen in pairs, right? Well,
once upon time, those simius were Nopon![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0002
rows.name:
Two Nopon lovers not get permission
to marry because one family think
they better than other family.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0003
rows.name:
And so lovers promise to be reborn as simius because
all simius are equal. Then lovers throw selves off
Everwhelm Falls to end it all! Kerplunge![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0004
rows.name:
...What does friend think? Does
friend like sad and moving tale
that springs from brain of Gotsu?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0008
rows.name:
Gotsu never got to know
real dadapon very well...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0009
rows.name:
Brotherpon Tatsu is the one Gotsu
really ought to call dadapon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Gotsu want to tell dadapon all the
fairy tales that Gotsu make up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0011
rows.name:
Then dadapon can sell them as book, rake
in huge coin, and live on easy street![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0012
rows.name:
THEN rich dadapon not have to worry about
getting smacked around by human friends and...
Oh, mo! Gotsu starting to lose track of plot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0021
rows.name:
Lot of creatures in Nightglow
Forest look like flowers and
trees, but does friend know why?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0022
rows.name:
Because they are all playing hide-and-seek!
Critters are cursed to play hide-and-seek
forever until someone find them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0023
rows.name:
Can friend hear their doomed voices
echoing through forest now? "Find
critter... Set critter free..."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0024
rows.name:
...What does friend think? Does friend
like the eerie, chilling tale of Gotsu?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Gotsu about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0016
rows.name:
Gotsu headed right to Sunlit
Spring after Satsu went missing.
Does friend know why?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0017
rows.name:
Because Gotsu heard about strange box that
is supposed to be there! Not because of worry
for Satsu. ...Apologies to brotherpon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0018
rows.name:
Anyway, Gotsu get there and
found strange box, but it was
burnt to crisp and broken![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0019
rows.name:
What happened to big box? Who is strong
and mean and growly enough to do that kind
of damage? Gotsu smell something fishy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev057801_MSG0020
rows.name:
Meh heh. Now Gotsu just have to come up with
epic tale so someone can turn it into
bestselling book and make Gotsu crazy rich![ST:wait ]
